response.step_by_step_log: Identified the first song as "Zettai Idol Yamenai de" and the second as "UNDEAD" from the on-screen text in the top-left corner. Searched for official lyrics for both songs using the specified strategy. Performed a search for '"絶対アイドル辞めないで" =LOVE Japanese and English lyrics' and '"UNDEAD" Ayase Japanese and English lyrics'. Compiled lyrics and metadata.
response.global_summary: This video is a concert performance featuring Hololive VTubers. It includes a group performance of the song "Zettai Idol Yamenai de" followed by a solo performance of "UNDEAD" by Kazama Iroha.

scenes.description: A group of Hololive VTubers performs "Zettai Idol Yamenai de" on a stage. Song title appears in the top-left corner.
scenes.song_title: 絶対アイドル辞めないで
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
絶対アイドル辞めないで（ずっと）
輝いてる君を見たい
もう ずっとずっとずっと
ステージにいて
私がもし君のとこ
離れたなら
君はちょっと寂しくなるかな
いじわる
好きな人がいるのなら
内緒にして
神様は
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Don't ever quit being an idol (Always)
I want to see you shining
Just keep on, keep on, keep on
Being on that stage
If I were to leave your side
I wonder if you'd feel a little lonely
Being mean...
If you have someone you like, keep it a secret
God is...

scenes.description: Kazama Iroha performs a solo song "UNDEAD" on stage, accompanied by background visuals. The song title is displayed in the top-left corner.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
(Unhappy?) 悩める人の子よ
(Unlucky?) 人ならざる者も
(Be happy!) 弛まず目指せよ
(Undead!) 生きていんだろ
目逸らした過去も
退屈な涙も
カウンセリング　やれやれ
過去の自分　自分　自分　自分と
もう
とっくに死んでる
と明滅な亡霊と対決
痛い痛い　で　痛い記憶の
ノックの音
残念　もういないのに
あれ？　そっちが良い？　アイロニーね
逃かされているのは　今の自分
ナンセンス　消えないレッテル
Yeah　弱はコンプレックス
取り憑かれているみたい
縋りついたまま
まだ離れない　愛しき日々
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
(Unhappy?) You troubled child
(Unlucky?) Including you who are not human
(Be happy!) Aim for it without slacking
(Undead!) You're still alive after all
The past you turned your eyes from too
The boring tears too
Counseling, do it or not
It's just the past, past, past, past
I'm dying from boredom
A battle with a transparent ghost
Living, wanting to live, a memory of breath
Too bad, you're not here anymore
Huh? Is that what you like? How ironic
What you are avoiding is your present self
Nonsense, an indelible label
Yeah, I'm a complex, exhausted, and...
It seems like I'm being consumed
I haven't let go of the past I'm clinging to
The dear past...
